title: RSA 1:2. Notice.
text:
The governor, with the advice and consent of the council, shall authorize the commissioner of the department of transportation in consultation with the attorney general to notify and make such arrangements with the proper authorities of the adjoining state as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.

Source: Source. 2000, 35:1, eff. Jan. 1, 2001.
title_name: TITLE I THE STATE AND ITS GOVERNMENT
